text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text: That should do it. I hope you'll take good care of Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Of course. I'll give her all the support she needs.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for such a sudden request. I'll never forget the kindness
you've shown me. Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I certainly wanted to pursue our dreams together, but these things
happen. If this is what you want, then that's the end of it. I shall
respect your decision.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Trainer
text_block_list.text:
As long as your passion remains, you'll be victorious! Now, make your
dreams come true with Team Sirius!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... It's nice to meet you all.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooaaa! It's SUPER nice to meet you too! You must be pretty
happy, Spe! You're finally on the same team!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... I mean, I am excited, but now that you say it out loud, it's kind of embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Now that you're all introduced, let's see how you run. Show us a lap
like it's a real race.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But don't think too hard about it. Just do what we did before—run
how you want.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But don't think too hard about it. Just do what we did before—run
how you want.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: How I want... Understood.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wow! That speed!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And she's still accelerating! Is she gonna cross the finish line like
that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka runs with such speed that it takes everyone's breath
away.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha... Keeping that speed up the whole lap would really be
something.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha... Keeping that speed up the whole lap would really be
something.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Heh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You flew off like a rocket there. You okay?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You flew off like a rocket there. You okay?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm fine... My pace was terrible, and my times were probably all over
the place, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It felt... so good. So fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as she struggles to catch her breath, Silence Suzuka's expression
is one of pure satisfaction. She's beaming with joy.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Just watching you is fun. It seriously looked like you might cross the finish line at full speed.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, now we're one step closer to finding your running style! One
more lap!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I happened to catch a bit of your training today. You were a
completely different person from the girl locking herself in the library.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wasn't it just awful? I wasn't paying attention to my pace or anything.
I just ran to my heart's content.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I swear... If you know how bad it looks, why are you all smiles?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I mean, it's not like I'm doing it on purpose... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All that studying for nothing... Yet for some reason, the scenery I seek
has never been more clear to me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: While your running is less refined, I will admit that I felt more threatened watching you this time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Although that doesn't mean I'm planning to lose.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's coming up, isn't it? The day we finally compete.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Leading the pack is Silence Suzuka! What a runaway! She's entered
the homestretch with a substantial lead!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: She's passed the two-hundred-meter mark in a flash! BUT WAIT! Last year's champion and the Empress Air Groove have caught up!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The two surge past Suzuka! They're going head-to-head! Who will
come out on top?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: From the outside by a hair, it's Air Groooove! Air Groove has taken first place in this G1 race!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Congrats on your first race with your new team.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It would've been better if I could've stayed in the lead the whole
time. Too bad I got sixth.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: But you looked like you were having fun out there. Heck, you're still smiling.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: But you looked like you were having fun out there. Heck, you're still smiling.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This running style is harder to win with, but the view from the front is
so beautiful...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll get an even prettier view going forward. You're just
brimming with passion, after all.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
And I'll be right there alongside you. I can't wait to see the day you
finally catch up to the scenery in your head.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
And I'll be right there alongside you. I can't wait to see the day you
finally catch up to the scenery in your head.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: When I finally catch up to the scenery in my head...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Perhaps that moment is the scenery you want to see, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I can't really picture it right now, but...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I can't really picture it right now, but...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I can already tell it's going to be quite a sight.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I'll do whatever I can to make it happen.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I'll do whatever I can to make it happen.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Understood.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I promise to give you the view that you long for.
